comments.vendor-provenance: quickjs-wasi@3.0.0 + binaryen are pinned to DOCUMENT/VERIFY the vendored bytes under vendor/ (see vendor/PROVENANCE.json + docs/provenance.md). They are NOT used to derive: cloud ships RAW quickjs.wasm and deriving via wasm-opt -Oz would byte-change the engine and invalidate every live snapshot (EngineHashMismatchError). binaryen pinned to match apps/kernel.
